<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-warning" aria-hidden="true"></span> `warning`

Prefer fmt.Print over builtin print.

## Bad

```go
print(message)
```

## Good

```go
fmt.Print(message)
```
